hadiths.chapter: 147. Reward of Ziyarat of Imam Husain (a.s.)
hadiths.ar: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُوسَی بْنِ الْمُتَوَکِّلِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ الْحِمْیَرِیُّ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِیسَی عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ سَمِعْتُهُ یَقُولُ لَیْسَ مَلَکٌ فِی السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ الْأَرْضِ إِلَّا وَ هُمْ یَسْأَلُونَ اللَّهَ أَنْ یَأْذَنَ لَهُمْ فِی زِیَارَهِ قَبْرِ الْحُسَیْنِ ع فَفَوْجٌ یَنْزِلُ وَ فَوْجٌ یَعْرُجُ.
hadiths.en: 45.  Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) said, “There is no angel in the heavens and the earth who comes for the Ziyarat of Imam Husain  (a.s.)  taking  permission  from  Allah.  One  group  of angels  or  other  keeps  on  coming  down  to  Imam  Husain (a.s.) or going up.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 147, H. 341
reference.chapter: Reward of Ziyarat of Imam Husain (a.s.)
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of Ziyarat of Imam Husain (a.s.)
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ١٤٧، ح ٣٤١

hadiths.chapter: 147. Reward of Ziyarat of Imam Husain (a.s.)
hadiths.ar: وَ بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ دَاوُدَ الرَّقِّیِّ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع یَقُولُ مَا خَلَقَ اللَّهُ خَلْقاً أَکْثَرَ مِنَ الْمَلَائِکَهِ وَ إِنَّهُ یَنْزِلُ مِنَ السَّمَاءِ کُلَّ مَسَاءٍ سَبْعُونَ أَلْفَ مَلَکٍ یَطُوفُونَ بِالْبَیْتِ لَیْلَتَهُمْ حَتَّی إِذَا طَلَعَ الْفَجْرُ انْصَرَفُوا إِلَی قَبْرِ النَّبِیِّ ص فَسَلَّمُوا عَلَیْهِ ثُمَّ یَأْتُونَ قَبْرَ أَمِیرِ الْمُؤْمِنِینَ ع فَیُسَلِّمُونَ عَلَیْهِ ثُمَّ یَأْتُونَ قَبْرَ الْحَسَنِ فَیُسَلِّمُونَ عَلَیْهِ ثُمَّ یَأْتُونَ قَبْرَ الْحُسَیْنِ فَیُسَلِّمُونَ عَلَیْهِ ثُمَّ یَعْرُجُونَ إِلَی السَّمَاءِ قَبْلَ أَنْ تَطْلُعَ الشَّمْسُ ثُمَّ تَنْزِلُ مَلَائِکَهُ النَّهَارِ سَبْعُونَ أَلْفَ مَلَکٍ فَیَطُوفُونَ بِالْبَیْتِ الْحَرَامِ نَهَارَهُمْ حَتَّی إِذَا دَنَتِ الشَّمْسُ لِلْغُرُوبِ انْصَرَفُوا إِلَی قَبْرِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ص فَیُسَلِّمُونَ عَلَیْهِ ثُمَّ یَأْتُونَ قَبْرَ أَمِیرِ الْمُؤْمِنِینَ فَیُسَلِّمُونَ عَلَیْهِ ثُمَّ یَأْتُونَ قَبْرَ الْحَسَنِ فَیُسَلِّمُونَ عَلَیْهِ ثُمَّ یَأْتُونَ قَبْرَ الْحُسَیْنِ فَیُسَلِّمُونَ عَلَیْهِ ثُمَّ یَعُودُونَ إِلَی السَّمَاءِ قَبْلَ أَنْ تَغْرُبَ الشَّمْسُ.
hadiths.en: 46.  Imam  Ja’far  Sadiq  (a.s.)  said,  “The  number  of  any creature of Allah is not more than that of angels. Seventy thousand  angels  come  down  to  earth  every  night  and circumambulate the Holy Kaaba all night. They come to the holy grave of the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) before sunrise and salute him, then salute Amirul Momineen (a.s.) at his grave, then  salute  Imam  Hasan  (a.s.)  at  his  grave  and  come  to salute Imam Husain (a.s.) at his grave and go back to the heaven before the sun rises. Then seventy thousand angels come  to  earth  during  the  day.  They  circumambulate  the Holy Kaaba all day and salute the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) at his  grave  before  sunset. Then they  come  to salute  Amirul Momineen (a.s.) at his grave, then salute Imam Hasan (a.s.) at his grave and finally they come to salute Imam Husain (a.s.) at his grave and return to heaven before the sun sets.

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 147, H. 342
reference.chapter: Reward of Ziyarat of Imam Husain (a.s.)
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of Ziyarat of Imam Husain (a.s.)
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ١٤٧، ح ٣٤٢

hadiths.chapter: 147. Reward of Ziyarat of Imam Husain (a.s.)
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی أَحْمَدُ بْنُ إِدْرِیسَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِیِّ بْنِ أَبِی عُثْمَانَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ فُضَیْلٍ عَنْ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَا بَیْنَ قَبْرِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ عَلِیٍّ ع إِلَی السَّمَاءِ السَّابِعَهِ مُخْتَلَفُ الْمَلَائِکَهِ.
hadiths.en: 47. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Ahmad b. Idris from Muhammad b. Ahmad from al-Hassan b. Ali b. Abi Uthman from Muhammad b. Fudhayl from Ishaq b. Ammar from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) says that angels continuously move to and fro the grave of Imam Husain (a.s.) and all the seven heavens.

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 147, H. 343
reference.chapter: Reward of Ziyarat of Imam Husain (a.s.)
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of Ziyarat of Imam Husain (a.s.)
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ١٤٧، ح ٣٤٣

hadiths.chapter: 147. Reward of Ziyarat of Imam Husain (a.s.)
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِسْمَاعِیلَ عَنْ حَنَانِ بْنِ سَدِیرٍ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع زُورُوهُ یَعْنِی قَبْرَ الْحُسَیْنِ ع وَ لَا تَجْفُوهُ فَإِنَّهُ سَیِّدُ الشُّهَدَاءِ وَ سَیِّدُ شَبَابِ أَهْلِ الْجَنَّهِ.
hadiths.en: 48.  Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) says, “Perform the Ziyarat of the grave of Imam Husain (a.s.) and don’t do injustice to him because he is the chief of martyrs and chief of the youths of Paradise.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 147, H. 344
reference.chapter: Reward of Ziyarat of Imam Husain (a.s.)
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of Ziyarat of Imam Husain (a.s.)
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ١٤٧، ح ٣٤٤

hadiths.chapter: 147. Reward of Ziyarat of Imam Husain (a.s.)
hadiths.ar: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنِ الْعَبَّاسِ بْنِ مَعْرُوفٍ عَنْ حَمَّادِ بْنِ عِیسَی عَنْ رِبْعِیِّ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ قَالَ: قُلْتُ لِأَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع بِالْمَدِینَهِ أَیْنَ قُبُورُ الشُّهَدَاءِ قَالَ أَ لَیْسَ أَفْضَلُ الشُّهَدَاءِ عِنْدَکَ الْحُسَیْنَ ع وَ الَّذِی نَفْسِی بِیَدِهِ إِنَّ حَوْلَ قَبْرِهِ أَرْبَعَهَ آلَافِ مَلَکٍ شُعْثٍ غُبْرٍ یَبْکُونَهُ إِلَی یَوْمِ الْقِیَامَهِ.
hadiths.en: 49. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from al-Abbas b. Ma’ruf from Hamad b. Isa from Rib’i b. Abdillah who said: The narrator asked Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) in Medina, “Where is the grave of the martyrs?” Imam (a.s.) asked, “Isn’t Imam Husain (a.s.) excellent among the martyrs according to you? I swear by Him in Whose hands is my life, four thousand angels surround the grave of Imam (a.s.) having their hair soiled and crying till the Day of Judgment.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 147, H. 345
reference.chapter: Reward of Ziyarat of Imam Husain (a.s.)
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of Ziyarat of Imam Husain (a.s.)
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ١٤٧، ح ٣٤٥

hadiths.chapter: 147. Reward of Ziyarat of Imam Husain (a.s.)
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ أَبِی الْخَطَّابِ عَنْ دَاوُدَ الْمُسْتَرِقِّ عَنْ أُمِّ سَعِیدٍ الْأَحْمَسِیَّهِ قَالَتْ کُنْتُ عِنْدَ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع وَ قَدْ بَعَثْتُ مَنْ یَکْتَرِی لِی حِمَاراً إِلَی قُبُورِ الشُّهَدَاءِ فَقَالَ ع مَا یَمْنَعُکَ مِنْ سَیِّدِ الشُّهَدَاءِ قَالَتْ قُلْتُ وَ مَنْ هَذَا جُعِلْتُ فِدَاکَ قَالَ فَذَلِکَ الْحُسَیْنُ بْنُ عَلِیٍّ ع قَالَتْ قُلْتُ وَ مَا لِمَنْ زَارَهُ قَالَ حِجَّهٌ وَ عُمْرَهٌ وَ مِنَ الْخَیْرِ کَذَا وَ کَذَا عَدَّ ثَلَاثَ مَرَّاتٍ بِیَدِهِ.
hadiths.en: 50.  Umme Saeed Hamsiya says that she was present near Imam  Ja’far  Sadiq  (a.s.).  She  had  sent  someone  to  rent  a mule so that she can perform Ziyarat of the martyrs. Imam (a.s.) asked her, “Why don’t you go for the Ziyarat of the chief of the martyrs?” She asked, “May I be sacrificed for you, who is the chief of the martyrs?” Imam (a.s.) replied, “Imam  Husain  (a.s.)  is  the  chief  of  martyrs.”  She  asked, “What is the reward of one who does his Ziyarat?” Imam (a.s.)  replied,  “It  is  equal  to  a  Hajj  and  Umrah.”  Then showing  his  three  fingers  he  conveyed  that  the  reward  is three times that of performing that deed.

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 147, H. 346
reference.chapter: Reward of Ziyarat of Imam Husain (a.s.)
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of Ziyarat of Imam Husain (a.s.)
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ١٤٧، ح ٣٤٦

hadiths.chapter: 147. Reward of Ziyarat of Imam Husain (a.s.)
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ أَبِی الْخَطَّابِ عَنِ الْحَکَمِ بْنِ مِسْکِینٍ عَنْ أُمِّ سَعِیدٍ الْأَحْمَسِیَّهِ قَالَتْ جِئْتُ إِلَی أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع فَدَخَلْتُ فَجَاءَتِ الْجَارِیَهُ فَقَالَتْ قَدْ جِئْتُکَ بِالدَّابَّهِ فَقَالَ ع یَا أُمَّ سَعِیدٍ أَیُّ شَیْ ءٍ هَذِهِ الدَّابَّهُ أَیْنَ تَبْغِینَ أَیْنَ تَذْهَبِینَ قَالَتْ قُلْتُ لِأَزُورَ قُبُورَ الشُّهَدَاءِ فَقَالَ أَخْبِرِینِی ذَلِکَ الْیَوْمَ مَا أَعْجَبَکُمْ یَا أَهْلَ الْعِرَاقِ تَأْتُونَ الشُّهَدَاءَ مِنْ سَفَرٍ بَعِیدٍ وَ تَتْرُکُونَ سَیِّدَ الشُّهَدَاءِ وَ لَا تَأْتُونَهُ قَالَتْ قُلْتُ لَهُ مَنْ سَیِّدُ الشُّهَدَاءِ فَقَالَ الْحُسَیْنُ بْنُ عَلِیٍّ ع قَالَتْ قُلْتُ إِنِّی امْرَأَهٌ فَقَالَ لَا بَأْسَ بِمَنْ کَانَتْ مِثْلَکِ أَنْ تَذْهَبَ إِلَیْهِ وَ تَزُورَهُ قُلْتُ أَیُّ شَیْ ءٍ لَنَا فِی زِیَارَتِهِ قَالَ تَعْدِلُ حِجَّهً وَ عُمْرَهً- وَ اعْتِکَافَ شَهْرَیْنِ فِی الْمَسْجِدِ الْحَرَامِ وَ صِیَامَهُمَا.
hadiths.en: 51.  Umme Saeed Hamsiya says that she was present near Imam  Ja’far  Sadiq  (a.s.)  when  her  maid  came  to  her  and said, “I have brought the mount.” Imam (a.s.) asked, “What is that mount for? Where are you going?” She replied, “I am going for Ziyarat of the graves of the  martyrs.”  Imam  (a.s.)  said,  “I  am  surprised  that  you people of Iraq travel long distances and perform Ziyarat of the  martyrs  but  don’t  go  for  the  Ziyarat  of  the  chief  of martyrs.  Why  don’t  you  go  for  his  Ziyarat?”  She  asked, “Who is the chief of martyrs?” Imam (a.s.) replied, “Imam Husain (a.s.).” She said, “But I am a woman.” Imam (a.s.) said, “Other  women like  you should also go for Ziyarat.” She asked, “What is the reward of his Ziyarat?” Imam (a.s.) replied, “The reward of this Ziyarat is equal to that of a Hajj, Umrah, performing  Etekaf in Masjid-e-Haraam  and fasting for two months.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 147, H. 347
reference.chapter: Reward of Ziyarat of Imam Husain (a.s.)
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of Ziyarat of Imam Husain (a.s.)
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ١٤٧، ح ٣٤٧

hadiths.chapter: 147. Reward of Ziyarat of Imam Husain (a.s.)
hadiths.ar: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُوسَی بْنِ الْمُتَوَکِّلِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَلِیُّ بْنُ الْحُسَیْنِ السَّعْدَآبَادِیُّ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْبَرْقِیِّ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنِ ابْنِ مُسْکَانَ عَنْ هَارُونَ بْنِ خَارِجَهَ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ قَالَ الْحُسَیْنُ بْنُ عَلِیٍّ ع أَنَا قَتِیلُ الْعَبْرَهِ قُتِلْتُ مَکْرُوباً وَ حَقِیقٌ عَلَی اللَّهِ أَنْ لَا یَأْتِیَنِی مَکْرُوبٌ إِلَّا أَرُدَّهُ وَ أَقْلِبَهُ إِلَی أَهْلِهِ مَسْرُوراً.
hadiths.en: 52.  Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) narrates that Imam Husain (a.s.) said, “I am Qateelul A’brah. I was martyred in the state of grief and sorrow. One who comes for my Ziyarat in a state of  grief  and  sorrow,  Allah  would  send  him  back  to  his relatives happy.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 147, H. 348
reference.chapter: Reward of Ziyarat of Imam Husain (a.s.)
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of Ziyarat of Imam Husain (a.s.)
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ١٤٧، ح ٣٤٨

hadiths.chapter: 148. Reward of the Ziyarat of the graves of Imams (a.s.)
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْبَرْقِیِّ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِیٍّ الْوَشَّاءِ قَالَ: قُلْتُ لِلرِّضَا ع مَا لِمَنْ أَتَی قَبْرَ أَحَدٍ مِنَ الْأَئِمَّهِ ع قَالَ لَهُ مِثْلُ مَا لِمَنْ أَتَی قَبْرَ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ فَقُلْتُ مَا لِمَنْ زَارَ قَبْرَ أَبِی الْحَسَنِ ع قَالَ لَهُ مِثْلُ مَا لِمَنْ زَارَ قَبْرَ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع.
hadiths.en: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to us by Sa’d b. Abdillah from Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah al-Barqi from al-Hassan b. Ali al-Washa who said: “He will get the reward of the Ziyarat of the grave of Imam Husain (a.s.).” He asked, “What is the reward of a person performing Ziyarat of the grave of Imam Musa Kadhim (a.s.).” Imam (a.s.) responded, “He will get the reward of performing the Ziyarat of the grave of Imam Husain (a.s.).”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 148, H. 349
reference.chapter: Reward of the Ziyarat of the graves of Imams (a.s.)
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of the Ziyarat of the graves of Imams (a.s.)
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ١٤٨، ح ٣٤٩

hadiths.chapter: 148. Reward of the Ziyarat of the graves of Imams (a.s.)
hadiths.ar: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنِ الْعَبَّاسِ بْنِ مَعْرُوفٍ عَنْ عَلِیِّ بْنِ مَهْزِیَارَ قَالَ: قُلْتُ لِأَبِی جَعْفَرٍ ع مَا لِمَنْ أَتَی قَبْرَ الرِّضَا ع قَالَ الْجَنَّهُ وَ اللَّهِ.
hadiths.en: 2. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from al-Abbas b. Ma’ruf from Ali b. Mahziyar who said: The narrator asked Imam Jawad (a.s.), “What is the reward of performing Ziyarat of Imam Ridha (a.s.)?” He replied, “By Allah, his destination is Paradise.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 148, H. 350
reference.chapter: Reward of the Ziyarat of the graves of Imams (a.s.)
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of the Ziyarat of the graves of Imams (a.s.)
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ١٤٨، ح ٣٥٠

hadiths.chapter: 148. Reward of the Ziyarat of the graves of Imams (a.s.)
hadiths.ar: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ غِیَاثٍ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِی نَصْرٍ الْبَزَنْطِیِّ قَالَ: قَرَأْتُ کِتَابَ أَبِی الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ع أَبْلِغْ شِیعَتِی أَنَّ زِیَارَتِی تَعْدِلُ عِنْدَ اللَّهِ أَلْفَ حِجَّهٍ قَالَ فَقُلْتُ لِأَبِی جَعْفَرٍ ع أَلْفَ حِجَّهٍ قَالَ إِی وَ اللَّهِ وَ أَلْفَا حِجَّهٍ لِمَنْ زَارَهُ عَارِفاً بِحَقِّهِ قَالَ الصَّادِقُ ع مَنْ زَارَ وَاحِداً مِنَّا کَانَ کَمَنْ زَارَ الْحُسَیْنَ ع.
hadiths.en: 3. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to us by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from Ahmad b. Muhammad b. Ghiyath from Ahmad b. Muhammad b. Abi Nasr al-Bazanti who said: It is narrated that a letter of Imam Ridha (a.s.) contained the following text: “Convey to my Shias that the reward of my Ziyarat equals to one thousand Hajjs.” The narrator asked Imam Jawad (a.s.), “Is it equal to a thousand Hajjs?” Imam (a.s.) replied, “Yes, one who performs his Ziyarat knowing his right this act is equal to a million Hajjs.” Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) says that one who performs the Ziyarat of any one of us will get the reward of the Ziyarat of Imam Husain (a.s.).”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 148, H. 351
reference.chapter: Reward of the Ziyarat of the graves of Imams (a.s.)
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of the Ziyarat of the graves of Imams (a.s.)
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ١٤٨، ح ٣٥١

hadiths.chapter: 149. Reward of Ziyarat of Masuma Qum
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَلِیُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِیمَ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ سَعْدِ بْنِ سَعِیدٍ عَنْ أَبِی الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ع قَالَ: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ قَبْرِ فَاطِمَهَ بِنْتِ مُوسَی بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ ع فَقَالَ مَنْ زَارَهَا فَلَهُ الْجَنَّهُ.
hadiths.en: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to us by Ali b. Ibrahim from his father from Sa’d b. Sa’eed from Abi al-Hassan al-Ridha (a.s.) who said: The narrator asked Imam Ridha (a.s.), “What is the reward of the Ziyarat of Fatima binte Imam Musa Kadhim (a.s.)?” Imam (a.s.) replied, “The person performing his Ziyarat will get Paradise.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 149, H. 352
reference.chapter: Reward of Ziyarat of Masuma Qum
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of Ziyarat of Masuma Qum
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ١٤٩، ح ٣٥٢

hadiths.chapter: 150. Reward of Ziyarat of Abdul Azim Hasani (r.a.) in Rayy
hadiths.ar: حَدَّثَنَا عَلِیُّ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا حَمْزَهُ بْنُ الْقَاسِمِ الْعَلَوِیُّ ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ یَحْیَی الْعَطَّارُ عَمَّنْ دَخَلَ عَلَی أَبِی الْحَسَنِ عَلِیِّ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ الْهَادِی مِنْ أَهْلِ الرَّیِّ قَالَ: دَخَلْتُ عَلَی أَبِی الْحَسَنِ الْعَسْکَرِیِّ ع فَقَالَ أَیْنَ کُنْتَ قُلْتُ زُرْتُ الْحُسَیْنَ ع قَالَ أَمَا إِنَّکَ لَوْ زُرْتَ قَبْرَ عَبْدِ الْعَظِیمِ عِنْدَکُمْ لَکُنْتَ کَمَنْ زَارَ الْحُسَیْنَ بْنَ عَلِیٍّ ع.
hadiths.en: 1.  The narrator says that a person from the people of Rayy went to Imam Ali Naqi (a.s.). Imam (a.s.) asked him, “Where are  you  coming  from?”  He  replied,  “I  am  coming  after performing  the  Ziyarat  of  Imam  Husain  (a.s.).”  The  Imam said: However if you perform the Ziyarat of Abdul Azim in the city of Rayy it is as if you have performed the Ziyarat of Imam Husain bin Ali (a.s.).”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 150, H. 353
reference.chapter: Reward of Ziyarat of Abdul Azim Hasani (r.a.) in Rayy
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of Ziyarat of Abdul Azim Hasani (r.a.) in Rayy
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ١٥٠، ح ٣٥٣

hadiths.chapter: 151. Reward of one who cannot do good to Ahle Bayt (a.s.) and he does so to a righteous devotee of theirs and Reward of one who cannot do Ziyarat of Ahle Bayt (a.s.) but does the Ziyarat of a righteous devotee of Ahle Bayt (a.s.)
hadiths.ar: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِیسَی بِإِسْنَادٍ ذَکَرَهُ عَنِ الصَّادِقِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ لَمْ یَقْدِرْ عَلَی صَلَاتِنَا فَلْیُصَلِّ صَالِحِی مَوَالِینَا وَ مَنْ لَمْ یَقْدِرْ عَلَی زِیَارَتِنَا فَلْیَزُرْ صَالِحِی مَوَالِینَا یَکْتُبِ اللَّهُ لَهُ ثَوَابَ زِیَارَتِنَا.
hadiths.en: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to us by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from Ahmad b. Muhammad b. Isa from a chain he narrated from al-Sadiq (a.s.) who said: “One who cannot do good to us, should do good to our lovers and friends. He will get the reward of doing good to us. One who cannot perform our Ziyarat, should perform the Ziyarat of our virtuous lovers and friends. He will get the reward of performing our Ziyarat.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 151, H. 354
reference.chapter: Reward of one who cannot do good to Ahle Bayt (a.s.) and he does so to a righteous devotee of theirs and Reward of one who cannot do Ziyarat of Ahle Bayt (a.s.) but does the Ziyarat of a righteous devotee of Ahle Bayt (a.s.)
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of one who cannot do good to Ahle Bayt (a.s.) and he does so to a righteous devotee of theirs and Reward of one who cannot do Ziyarat of Ahle Bayt (a.s.) but does the Ziyarat of a righteous devotee of Ahle Bayt (a.s.)
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ١٥١، ح ٣٥٤

hadiths.chapter: 152. Reward of doing good to an Imam
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ إِدْرِیسَ عَنْ عِمْرَانَ بْنِ مُوسَی عَنْ یَعْقُوبَ بْنِ یَزِیدَ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِی نَصْرٍ عَنْ حَمَّادِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ عَنْ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ قَالَ: قُلْتُ لِلصَّادِقِ ع مَا مَعْنَی قَوْلِهِ تَبَارَکَ وَ تَعَالَی- مَنْ ذَا الَّذِی یُقْرِضُ اللَّهَ قَرْضاً حَسَناً فَیُضاعِفَهُ لَهُ أَضْعافاً کَثِیرَهً قَالَ صِلَهُ الْإِمَامِ- أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ عَلِیِّ بْنِ الْفَضْلِ عَنْ أَبِی طَالِبٍ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ الصَّلْتِ عَنْ یُونُسَ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ عَنْ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع بِمِثْلِهِ.
hadiths.en: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to us by Ahmad b. Idris from ’Imran b. Musa from Ya’qub b. Yazid from Ahmad b. Muhammad b. Abi Nasr from Hamad b. Uthman from Ishaq b. Ammar who said: The narrator asked Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.), “What is the meaning of this verse: ‘Who is it that will offer of Allah a goodly gift, so He will multiply it to him manifold’?”10 Imam (a.s.) replied, “It implies doing good to an Imam.” The narrator says that his father too heard such a tradition from Imam (a.s.).

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 152, H. 355
reference.chapter: Reward of doing good to an Imam
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of doing good to an Imam
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ١٥٢، ح ٣٥٥

hadiths.chapter: 153. Reward of the people of Quran
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی أَحْمَدُ بْنُ إِدْرِیسَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی أَبُو إِسْحَاقَ إِبْرَاهِیمُ بْنُ هَاشِمٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ أَبِی الْحَسَنِ الْفَارِسِیِ عَنْ سُلَیْمَانَ بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ الْجَعْفَرِیِّ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِیلَ بْنِ أَبِی زِیَادٍ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِیهِ ع قَالَ قَالَ النَّبِیُّ ص إِنَّ أَهْلَ الْقُرْآنِ فِی أَعْلَی دَرَجَهٍ مِنَ الْآدَمِیِّینَ مَا خَلَا النَّبِیِّینَ وَ الْمُرْسَلِینَ وَ لَا تَسْتَضْعِفُوا أَهْلَ الْقُرْآنِ وَ حُقُوقَهُمْ فَإِنَّ لَهُمْ مِنَ اللَّهِ لَمَکَاناً.
hadiths.en: 1.  Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) narrates from his father that the Holy  Prophet  (s.a.w.s.)  said,  “The  ranks  of  the  people  of Quran come next to that of the prophets and messengers. Don’t ever consider the people of Quran as weak and don’t reduce their rights for they have a high status near Allah.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 153, H. 356
reference.chapter: Reward of the people of Quran
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of the people of Quran
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ١٥٣، ح ٣٥٦

hadiths.chapter: 154. Reward of reciting a complete Quran in Mecca
hadiths.ar: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْحُسَیْنِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِی الْخَطَّابِ عَنِ النَّضْرِ بْنِ شُعَیْبٍ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ مَادٍّ الْقَلَانِسِیِّ عَنْ أَبِی حَمْزَهَ عَنْ أَبِی جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ: مَنْ خَتَمَ الْقُرْآنَ بِمَکَّهَ مِنْ جُمُعَهٍ إِلَی جُمُعَهٍ وَ أَقَلَّ مِنْ ذَلِکَ وَ أَکْثَرَ وَ خَتَمَهُ یَوْمَ الْجُمُعَهِ کَتَبَ اللَّهُ لَهُ مِنَ الْأَجْرِ وَ الْحَسَنَاتِ مِنْ أَوَّلِ جُمُعَهٍ کَانَتْ فِی الدُّنْیَا إِلَی آخِرِ جُمُعَهٍ تَکُونُ فِیهَا وَ إِنْ خَتَمَهُ فِی سَائِرِ الْأَیَّامِ فَکَذَلِکَ.
hadiths.en: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from Muhammad b. al-Hussain from Ibn Abi al-Khattab from al-Nadhr b. Shu’aib from al-Hussain b. Mad al-Qalanisi from Abi Hamzah from Abi Ja’far (a.s.) who said: “One who recites a complete Quran between time span of two Fridays or more or less than that then concludes this recitation on Friday Allah would note down the reward of all the good deeds performed from a Friday before his birth till the last Friday. And if he concludes it on any other day then too he will get the same reward.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 154, H. 357
reference.chapter: Reward of reciting a complete Quran in Mecca
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of reciting a complete Quran in Mecca
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ١٥٤، ح ٣٥٧

hadiths.chapter: 155. Reward of memorizing the Quran with difficulty or with ease
hadiths.ar: حَدَّثَنِی أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ الْحُسَیْنِ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ سَعِیدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِی عُمَیْرٍ عَنْ مَنْصُورِ بْنِ عَوْنٍ عَنِ الصَّبَّاحِ بْنِ سَیَابَهَ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع یَقُولُ مَنْ شُدِّدَ عَلَیْهِ الْقُرْآنُ کَانَ لَهُ أَجْرٌ وَ مَنْ یُسِّرَ عَلَیْهِ کَانَ مَعَ الْأَبْرَارِ.
hadiths.en: 1.  Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) says, “One who memorizes Quran with difficulty will get two rewards and one who memorizes it with ease would be included among the virtuous.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 155, H. 358
reference.chapter: Reward of memorizing the Quran with difficulty or with ease
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of memorizing the Quran with difficulty or with ease
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ١٥٥، ح ٣٥٨

hadiths.chapter: 156. Reward of reciting the Holy Quran for youth
hadiths.ar: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُوسَی بْنِ الْمُتَوَکِّلِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ الْحِمْیَرِیُّ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِیسَی عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ مَالِکِ بْنِ عَطِیَّهَ عَنْ مِنْهَالٍ الْقَصَّابِ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ الْقُرْآنَ وَ هُوَ شَابٌّ مُؤْمِنٌ اخْتَلَطَ الْقُرْآنُ بِدَمِهِ وَ لَحْمِهِ وَ جَعَلَهُ اللَّهُ مَعَ السَّفَرَهِ الْکِرَامِ الْبَرَرَهِ وَ کَانَ الْقُرْآنُ حَجِیجاً عَنْهُ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ وَ یَقُولُ یَا رَبِّ إِنَّ کُلَّ عَامِلٍ قَدْ أَصَابَ أَجْرَ عَمَلِهِ إِلَّا عَامِلِی فَبَلِّغْ بِهِ کَرِیمَ عَطَایَاکَ فَیَکْسُوهُ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ حُلَّتَیْنِ مِنْ حُلَلِ الْجَنَّهِ وَ یُوضَعُ عَلَی رَأْسِهِ تَاجُ الْکَرَامَهِ ثُمَّ یُقَالُ لَهُ هَلْ أَرْضَیْنَاکَ فِیهِ فَیَقُولُ الْقُرْآنُ یَا رَبِّ قَدْ کُنْتُ أَرْغَبُ لَهُ فِیمَا هُوَ أَفْضَلُ مِنْ هَذَا قَالَ فَیُعْطَی الْأَمْنَ بِیَمِینِهِ وَ الْخُلْدَ بِیَسَارِهِ ثُمَّ یَدْخُلُ الْجَنَّهَ فَیُقَالُ لَهُ اقْرَأْ آیَهً وَ اصْعَدْ دَرَجَهً ثُمَّ یُقَالُ لَهُ بَلَّغْنَا بِهِ وَ أَرْضَیْنَاکَ فِیهِ فَیَقُولُ اللَّهُمَّ نَعَمْ قَالَ وَ مَنْ قَرَأَ کَثِیراً وَ تَعَاهَدَهُ مِنْ شِدَّهِ حِفْظِهِ أَعْطَاهُ اللَّهُ أَجْرَ هَذَا مَرَّتَیْنِ.
hadiths.en: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Musa b. al-Mutawakil who said it was narrated to me by Abdillah b. Ja’far al-Himyari from Ahmad b. Muhammad b. Isa from al-Hassan b. Mahbub from Malik b. ’Atiyyah from Minhal al-Qassab from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “If a youth among believers recites the Holy Quran it gets mixed in his flesh and blood. The Almighty Allah would keep him with virtuous and honored angels and the Holy Quran would act as a shield against the fire of Hell for him on the Day of Judgment. The Holy Quran would say, ‘People who acted upon anything except me have got their result. O Allah! You give the best rewards to these people’. Allah would make the reciter of the Holy Quran wear two dresses of Paradise and keep the crown of honor on his head. Allah would tell the Holy Quran, ‘Are you satisfied now?’ It would reply, ‘I desire a better reward’. Now Allah would grant peace from right and an eternal Paradise from left and then make him enter Paradise. He would be told in Paradise, ‘Go on reciting a verse of the Holy Quran and your position will go on increasing by one level for each of them’. Then the Holy Quran would be addressed, ‘Are you pleased now?’ The Holy Quran would say, ‘Yes my Lord!’” Imam (a.s.) says that one who recites the Holy Quran much and is regular in it, the Almighty Allah would grant him this reward twice.

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 156, H. 359
reference.chapter: Reward of reciting the Holy Quran for youth
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of reciting the Holy Quran for youth
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ١٥٦، ح ٣٥٩

hadiths.chapter: 157. Reward of reciting the Holy Quran in Salaat, apart from it, sitting and standing
hadiths.ar: حَدَّثَنِی جَعْفَرُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مَسْرُوقٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی الْحَسَنُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَامِرٍ عَنْ عَمِّهِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عَامِرٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ سُلَیْمَانَ عَنْ أَبِی جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ الْقُرْآنَ قَائِماً فِی صَلَاتِهِ کَتَبَ اللَّهُ لَهُ بِکُلِّ حَرْفٍ مِائَهَ حَسَنَهٍ وَ مَنْ قَرَأَهُ فِی صَلَاتِهِ جَالِساً کَتَبَ اللَّهُ لَهُ بِکُلِّ حَرْفٍ خَمْسِینَ حَسَنَهً وَ مَنْ قَرَأَهُ فِی غَیْرِ صَلَاتِهِ کَتَبَ اللَّهُ لَهُ بِکُلِّ حَرْفٍ عَشْرَ حَسَنَاتٍ.
hadiths.en: 1. It was narrated to me by Ja’far b. Muhammad b. Masruq who said it was narrated to me by al-Hassan b. Muhammad b. ’Amir from his uncle Abdillah b. ’Amir from al-Hassan b. Mahbub from Abdillah b. Sulayman from Abi Ja’far (a.s.) who said: “One who recites the Holy Quran while standing in Salaat, Allah would grant him one hundred rewards for each alphabet and if a person recites the Holy Quran while sitting in Salaat, Allah would grant him fifty rewards for each alphabet. One who recites the Holy Quran apart from Salaat, Allah would grant him ten rewards for each letter.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 157, H. 360
reference.chapter: Reward of reciting the Holy Quran in Salaat, apart from it, sitting and standing
